contents:
[package]
name = "tauri-plugin-nosleep"
metadata = "tauri-plugin"
version = "2.0.0-beta.1"
authors = ["Peter Evers <pevers90@gmail.com>"]
license = "MIT"
description = "Tauri plugin to prevent the power save functionality in the OS"
edition = "2021"
rust-version = "1.70"
exclude = ["/examples", "/webview-dist", "/webview-src", "/node_modules"]
links = "tauri-plugin-nosleep"

[dependencies]
serde = "1.0"
thiserror = "1.0"

[dependencies.tauri]
version = "2.0.0-beta.5"

[dependencies.nosleep]
version = "0.2.1"
features = ["serde"]

[build-dependencies.tauri-plugin]
version = "2.0.0-beta.3"
features = ["build"]
